transcript_preview: 3.6. Klausies un lasi. Sveiks! Sveiks! Kur tu biji? Es biju laukos. Ko tu laukos redzēji? Skaties, te ir fotogrāfijas. Tas ir meš. Mežā ir koki un sēnes. Redzi, tur ir skaistas sēnes. Skaties, tā ir pļava Pļavā ir govs Laukos ir lielas pļav
translation_preview: 3.6. Listen and read. Hey! Hey! Where were you? I was in the countryside. What did you see in the country? Look, there's photos. That's me. There are trees and mushrooms in the forest. You see, there's beautiful mushrooms. Look, it's a mead
